candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement; same values as Total Revenue, so this is the more specific non-total label.
Also matches top-line revenue, but is a total/subtotal and duplicates Operating revenue.
Income item, not total revenue.
Non-operating/associate income, not sales revenue.
Tax-related expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income allocation line, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for changing labels over time. 'Operating revenue' is preferred over duplicated total row 'Total Revenue'.

candidates.why: Exact match for direct production/service costs on the income statement.
Inventory asset category on the balance sheet, not an expense line.
Personnel overhead component; appropriate SG&A component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A row exists.
Equity/OCI-type line below profit, not operating overhead expense in the income statement.
Could be R&D, but appears as a supplemental/disclosure row near the bottom and shows no preview values; not needed unless used for XRD interaction.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row exists. Selected the best operating overhead components and excluded depreciation, impairments, taxes, finance items, and totals.

candidates.why: Tax credit/income item, not R&D expense.
Semantically the correct R&D label, but it appears as a supplemental/disclosure row near the bottom and not as a clear above-EBIT operating expense line in the preview.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is clearly reported as an operating expense above EBIT. 'R&D Expenditure tax credit' is not an expense, and 'Research and Development Expenses' appears only as a supplemental/disclosure row.

candidates.why: Profit subtotal, not interest expense.
Interest income, opposite of interest expense.
Best single recurring finance-cost line across years; captures interest expense without mixing in FX/derivative items.
Granular recurring interest component, but only available in some years and likely included in Net interest expenses.
Granular recurring interest component, but likely included in Net interest expenses.
Granular recurring interest component, but likely included in Net interest expenses.
Granular recurring lease-interest component, but likely included in Net interest expenses.
Recurring finance-cost type item, but may overlap with broader finance lines and is less clearly pure interest.
Generic finance-cost label, but empty in preview and less specific than Net interest expenses.
Profit attribution line, not interest expense.
Profit attribution line, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; likely overlaps with Interest Expense on Lease / Net interest expenses.
Equity attribution line, not interest expense.
Equity attribution line, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the single recurring net interest expense line to avoid double counting versus underlying components and to exclude FX/derivative valuation items.

candidates.row_label: Change in Tax Rate on Equity Posted PPA in Prior Years
candidates.why: OCI/equity adjustment line on income statement, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement performance measure, not balance sheet equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Specific equity reserve, not total equity.
Best owner/parent equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests; confirmed by separate NCI line and higher 'Total equity' including NCI.
Appears to include non-controlling interests because it equals Total Equity plus Non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: Chose 'Total Equity' because it excludes non-controlling interests; 'Total equity' appears to include NCI and would double count with MIB.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Income attribution line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Exact balance sheet minority interest/NCI line.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; same values as Non-controlling interests.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for changing labels over time. Both balance sheet labels represent minority interest / NCI.
